parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title, message: $json.message, priority: $json.priority, extras: { "client::display": { contentType: "text/markdown" } } }) }}

parameters.content:
## Setup Checklist

Before activating, replace every `YOUR_*` placeholder:

- `YOUR_MCP_SERVER` — URL of your MCP filesystem server
- `YOUR_CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_ID` / `YOUR_CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_SECRET` — Cloudflare Access tokens (remove headers if not using CF)
- `YOUR_PROJECT` — your project directory name under `/opt/stacks/`
- `YOUR_USER` — Linux user that owns the project and has Claude Code authenticated
- `YOUR_GOTIFY_SERVER` / `YOUR_GOTIFY_APP_TOKEN` — Gotify instance (or remove Gotify nodes entirely)
- `Your/Timezone` — IANA timezone, e.g. `America/New_York`

📖 Full setup guide: [README](https://github.com/Jnelsonwis/n8n-claude-plan-alignment)

## Customize This Prompt

The `prompt` variable inside this node is the heart of the workflow. The default uses a generic 5-phase template:

1. **Schema & Data** — check DB tables/columns exist
2. **API & Routing** — verify endpoints are defined
3. **Business Logic Invariants** — flag BLOCKED BY DESIGN / PROTECTED
4. **Dependencies & Placement** — check file dirs and packages
5. **Cross-Cutting** — env vars, infrastructure changes

Replace `[YOUR_SCHEMA_FILE]`, `[YOUR_ROUTES_DIR]`, etc. with your actual paths.

📖 Stack examples (TypeScript, Django, Rails, Go, Next.js):
`examples/run-claude-prompt-node-example.md`

## Gotify is Optional

These two nodes send a severity-graded push notification:

- ✅ All Clear (priority 1)
- 📋 Warnings Only (priority 3)
- ⚠️ Issues Found (priority 5)
- 🚨 CRITICAL (priority 8)

**To remove notifications:**
1. Delete **Build Gotify Message** and **Send Gotify**
2. Connect **Run Claude Code** → **Format Report** directly

The webhook response still returns the full report.
